DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: One per wheel may be broken or missing provided:

ListItem.Para: Affected wheel is checked for broken parts or damage, and replaced if broken parts or damage is found.
Associated brake is checked for broken parts or damage, and is replaced or deactivated if broken parts or damage is found.
Before each departure, wheel is inspected for additional broken or missing tie bolts.
Operations are limited to 5 flights before repairs are made.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Inspect the affected wheel and brake assemblies for broken parts or damage and before each departure inspect remaining tie bolts. (AMM DDG 32-45-02).

ListItem.Para: Inspect the wheel for broken or missing parts or damage.
If other bolts are broken, loose or missing, or if other areas of the wheel have been damaged, the affected wheel must be replaced.
Deflate affected wheel to 40 psig or less.
Remove each wheel with a broken, loose or missing tiebolt.
Inspect the wheel for broken or missing parts or damage.
If other bolts are broken, loose or missing, or if other areas of the wheel have been damaged, the affected wheel must be replaced.
Inspect the brake for broken or missing parts or damage.
Before each departure, inspect remaining tie bolts on the affected wheel (wheel removal not required) to ensure no other bolts are broken, loose or missing.
